description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a mix of gray, white, and light brown wall panels, with large rectangular windows distributed asymmetrically across the facade. The property is enclosed by a low, solid fence and includes a small front yard with a paved path and a green lawn area. The rear of the house has additional green space and what appears to be a patio or outdoor seating area. The roof includes multiple skylights and mechanical units, suggesting a focus on natural light and ventilation. The overall structure is boxy and streamlined, with clean lines and a focus on functional, contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of gray, white, and brown exterior panels, surrounded by a low fence and green yard areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a small front yard with a paved path.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated facade, asymmetrical window placement, and rear green space.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, patio area, and additional yard space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary facade, window arrangement, and side yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and a paved path leading from the front yard
